title: The Universal Explanation Impossibility
description: Lean 4 formalization proving that no explanation of an underspecified system can be simultaneously faithful, stable, and decisive when the Rashomon property holds. The core theorem (explanation_impossibility) carries zero axiom dependencies and is instantiated across six explanation types: additive attributions (SHAP, IG, LIME), attention maps, counterfactual explanations, concept probes (TCAV), causal discovery (DAGs), and model selection. 319 type-checked theorems+lemmas from 60 axioms with 0 sorry across 67 files.
